name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The classic interlocking pattern turns small daily essentials into fashion accessories. Novel textures and finishes continue to shine in Gucci's new collection, showcasing vibrant energy and personality. This wallet is crafted from deep grey and black grained calfskin, adorned with the GG logo throughout.
name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The classic interlocking pattern turns small daily essentials into fashion accessories. Novel textures and finishes continue to shine in Gucci's new collection, showcasing vibrant energy and personality. This wallet is crafted from deep grey and black grained calfskin, adorned with the GG logo throughout.
Deep grey and black GG grained calfskin
Cloud fabric lining
Interior: Eight card slots and two bill slots
Model: 739475.
Open dimensions: 21cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Color: Grey/Original leather.
Made in Italy
Weight: approx. 0.11kg
